title: 20 Party Blowers - 8cm Multi-Colour Whistles, Foil Blowouts, Hen Parties and Stag Do's (Party Blowers, 20, Count)
features: This brilliant party favour pack is a great addition to any celebration, adding a burst of fun, excitement and noise to your party. These vibrant multi-colour whistles are great for hen parties, Christmas events, and much, much more!

This fantastic set of party blowers comes in a wide range of colours in each pack, including bold blues, gorgeous greens, perfect pinks, vibrant yellows and much, much more. Each blower is topped with a foil blowout that is equally vibrant in colour, ensuring a fun and happy atmosphere. Let your guests choose their favourites and join in the superb celebrations!
Simply blow into the end of the blower of your choice and the foil end will unroll immediately, producing a loud and amusing noise!

In each package, you will receive a pack of 20 party blowers in a variety of different colours. Each blower measures approximately 8 x 0.5cm (3.14 x 0.19) in size and produces a fun and amusing noise when blown upon, blowing the whistle also causes the foil end to unfold which allows you to put the beautiful and vibrant colours on show
description: Product description In each package, you will receive a pack of 20 party blowers. These vibrant multi-colour whistles bring lively fun to any event. With a variety of colours, they add a vibrant touch to the party atmosphere. Portable and durable, they ensure enjoyment for adults by helping to create long-lasting memories and keeping the party atmosphere buoyant. Safety Warning Small parts, choking hazard
